name: EMD shortfall or missing
definition: Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) below mandated percentage, missing entirely, or in non-acceptable form (cheque instead of DD/BG/BC).

name: EMD exceeds prescribed cap
definition: EMD demanded exceeds maximum cap (typically Rs. 1 crore) thereby unduly restricting bidder participation.

name: Performance Bank Guarantee shortfall
definition: PBG below mandated percentage of contract value or with insufficient validity period beyond DLP.

name: Bid validity period below minimum
definition: Bid validity period specified is shorter than the mandated minimum (typically 90 days for Works, 120 for Goods).

name: Bank Guarantee validity below required
definition: BG validity (EMD or PBG) does not extend at least 60 days beyond bid validity / DLP as required.

name: Reverse tendering not invoked above threshold
definition: Procurement value ≥ Rs. 1 crore (per AP GO.Ms.79/2020) but reverse tendering provision not included.

name: Judicial Preview not invoked for high-value infra
definition: Infrastructure tender ≥ Rs. 100 crore not submitted for retired HC judge preview as required by AP Infrastructure (Transparency) Act 2019.

name: Integrity Pact clause absent
definition: Tender value above CVC threshold but Integrity Pact clause and Independent External Monitor (IEM) provisions are absent.

name: e-Procurement portal not used
definition: Procurement value ≥ Rs. 2 lakh routed outside the e-procurement portal in violation of CVC/AP mandate.

name: Suspected splitting of works to avoid threshold
definition: Multiple smaller tenders by same authority within short window, summing above a threshold that would have triggered higher approval or different procedure.

name: Unduly restrictive specifications
definition: Technical specifications written narrowly enough that only one or two suppliers can qualify (brand-specific, OEM-locked, unusual combination of features).

name: Brand-specific procurement without justification
definition: Tender names a specific brand/model without 'or equivalent' clause and without recorded technical justification.

name: Single-source procurement without recorded justification
definition: Single-source / proprietary procurement without the written justification mandated by GFR Rule 166.

name: Limited tender used outside permitted conditions
definition: Limited tender invoked when value/conditions require open tender per GFR Rule 162.

name: Bid notice period below minimum
definition: Time between publication and bid submission deadline shorter than mandated minimum (typically 21–30 days).

name: Tender not published in mandated channels
definition: Tender not published in CPP Portal, AP eProcurement, departmental website, and (for ≥ Rs. 25 lakh works) at least one newspaper.

name: Discriminatory eligibility criteria
definition: Eligibility requirements (turnover, experience, geographic) set higher than necessary for the work, restricting competition.

name: Annual turnover requirement excessive
definition: Required annual average turnover exceeds typical multiplier (CVC norm: ≤ 2× estimated annual contract value).

name: Similar work experience requirement excessive
definition: Similar work value/quantity requirement exceeds CVC norms (typically 1× value of single similar work or 2× of two similar works).

name: MSE/Startup preference clauses missing
definition: Tender does not include the price preference, EMD relaxation, and turnover relaxation clauses required for MSEs and Startups.

name: Make-in-India preference clauses missing
definition: Class-I / Class-II local supplier preference clauses absent though tender qualifies under PPP-MII Order 2017.

name: Wrong cover system for tender type
definition: Single/two/three-cover system used inconsistently with tender type, value, and procurement type rules.

name: Evaluation criteria vague or non-quantifiable
definition: Technical and financial evaluation criteria not stated with explicit weights, formulae, and pass/fail thresholds.

name: Technical scoring scheme not disclosed
definition: QCBS / LCS / FBS / QBS scoring formula not disclosed in tender document.

name: Price adjustment formula incorrect or absent
definition: For long-duration works, price adjustment formula (escalation) is missing, incorrect index used, or contradicts CPWD/MoSPI norms.

name: Variation/extra-item cap not specified
definition: Permissible variation in quantities/value (typically ±25%) not stated.

name: Defects Liability Period not specified
definition: DLP duration and PBG release schedule not specified, or DLP shorter than mandated minimum (typically 12 months).

name: Liquidated Damages clause missing or capped wrong
definition: LD percentage per week of delay, and overall LD cap (typically 10% of contract value) not specified.

name: Arbitration clause non-compliant with DoE June 2024
definition: Arbitration clause does not follow DoE June 2024 guidelines (govt arbitration only ≤ Rs. 10 cr; mediation mandatory).

name: Dispute jurisdiction clause incorrect
definition: Jurisdiction clause names wrong court or fails to vest jurisdiction in AP courts as required.

name: Payment terms vague or non-compliant
definition: Milestones, RA bill schedule, retention percentage, mobilisation advance terms not clearly specified.

name: Mobilisation advance exceeds permissible cap
definition: Mobilisation advance > 10% of contract value (CPWD norm) without recorded justification.

name: Insurance requirements missing
definition: CAR/EAR, workmen compensation, third-party liability insurance requirements not specified or inadequate.

name: Safety / labour-law clauses missing
definition: Compliance with BoCW, Minimum Wages Act, EPF, ESI not made contractor's responsibility.

name: DPDP Act 2023 compliance clauses missing
definition: Data handling clauses absent though tender involves personal/sensitive data processing.

name: Conflict of interest declaration not required
definition: Bidders not required to declare conflict of interest with department officials / evaluation committee members.

name: Repeated winner / collusion signal
definition: Same bidder winning ≥ 60% of department's tenders over preceding 12 months — flag for vigilance review.

name: Bids clustered suspiciously close
definition: Top 3 financial bids within 1% of each other AND within 0.5% of estimated cost — possible cover bidding.

name: Single bid accepted without re-tender
definition: Only one bid received and accepted without re-tender, in cases where re-tender is mandated.

name: Post-tender negotiation with L1 (banned)
definition: Price negotiation with L1 bidder after technical opening — explicitly banned by CVC except in defined exceptional cases.

name: Material corrigendum issued without bid extension
definition: Corrigendum changing eligibility, scope, or BoQ issued without proportionate extension of bid submission deadline.

name: Rate reasonableness assessment missing
definition: No documented comparison of L1 rates against estimated cost, market rates, or last similar tender.

name: Tender approved below required authority level
definition: Approval authority does not match value-band threshold for the department per AP Financial Code.

name: Administrative + Technical sanction not on record
definition: AS + TS orders not referenced in tender document or not on record before publication.

name: Telugu translation of tender notice missing
definition: Tender notice (NIT) not published in Telugu though required for state-funded tenders.
